claim: The causal research workbench preflight is a replayable toy-DAG proof packet: it declares graph assumptions, emits CAUSAL_DAG_FIXTURE_MATCH, identifies age plus baseline_health as the exact minimal adjustment set, rejects configured negative controls, and keeps broader causal-discovery, LLM reasoning, biomedical, and BuildLang/buildc-native claims out of scope.
scope: Project Telos twenty-eighth-wave prooflesson for proof-carrying causal claims
decision_summary: The packet verifies the local causal DAG preflight shape and claim boundary. It does not verify causal discovery, LLM causal reasoning, biomedical recommendations, or BuildLang/buildc-native runtime execution.
